title: ilex valerii var. ramonensis
intro: Ilex valerii var. ramonensis, also known as the Philippine holly or Ramon's holly, is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the Ilex genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, and its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ilex valerii var. ramonensis include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving blood circulation, and providing immune system support. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make capsules or tablets for medicinal purposes.
